name: Daps Centurionis
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Pan gravy for roast lamb
recipeInstructions:
About 4 hours before you want to serve, prepare the leg of lamb and place it in the oven. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Dust the inside of the roasting bag with flour. Place a layer of chopped onion chunks on the bottom of the bag, then put the leg of lamb on top. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the lamb and seal the bag. Make small holes in the bag's top. Optionally insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the roast through the bag to check for doneness (160 to 190 degrees Fahrenheit covers a range from moderately rare to well done).
About 40 minutes before serving, prepare the lentils. Heat oil in a saucepan and cook chopped onion until soft and golden. Add lentils, beef broth, water, bay leaf, salt, and pepper. Simmer for approximately 30 minutes or until lentils are tender. Remove bay leaf, add sliced green onions and chopped parsley. Mix well. As serving time approaches, stir in 1/3 cup pan gravy from the roast with minimal added fat.
